text.en: Coach Kyle - Approach Patterns

opener-direct-compliment.speaker: me

text.en: Hey, excuse me. I actually have to get going, but I just wanted to say I thought you looked really cute. I just wanted to come over and say what's up really quick.

opener-direct-compliment.source: Simple cold approach [neZv2hbkABQ], Easiest Way To Start More Conversations [YOEP0380xD4], 5 Women 5 Different Reactions [5sTASDqe0u8]

text.en: Oh, thank you! That's sweet.
Yeah, I thought you looked really cute with the all white on. Is that your job uniform? Oh, did you just get out of work or what?
Yeah, it's actually my job outfit.
Yeah, I can tell because you looked so relieved. I saw you sitting here, lounging back, smiling, smoking your cigarette. Did you have a long week or what?
Yeah, I actually worked a lot.
I mean honestly I was gonna meet some friends in a couple minutes but I just thought you looked cute so I was like I need to come over and say what's up.
Thank you.
I know you're kind of just lounging back. So are you going home after this or what are you doing? Whatever, IG or do you use WhatsApp or what do you have?
Yeah, let's keep in touch. You have Instagram?
Cool, yeah. I'm Kyle by the way. K-Y-L-E. Yeah, we'll talk soon, all right? Take care.

followup-observation-vibe.speaker: me

text.en: You have an interesting personality. You're very fun and animated, in a good way. I like your vibe. I could totally tell Miami has not corrupted you.

followup-observation-vibe.source: 5 Small Things That Create BIG Attraction [SwKI2EmazhA]

her-vibe-semi-corrupted.speaker: her

text.en: No, thankfully. I'm semi-corrupted. I'm not from here originally, but I've been here for a little while.

her-vibe-semi-corrupted.source: 5 Small Things That Create BIG Attraction [SwKI2EmazhA]

her-direct-neutral-confused.speaker: her

text.en: [Looks over shoulder, still walking, looks confused]

her-direct-neutral-confused.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

persist-one-second.speaker: me

text.en: Hey, excuse me. Excuse me. Hi, one second, really quick. I was actually walking back that way, but I just saw you. I thought you had a really interesting look. I wanted to come over really quick and say hi.

persist-one-second.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

her-still-confused.speaker: her

text.en: [Stops but still looks around, uncertain]

her-still-confused.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

stay-calm-processing.speaker: me

text.en: You look confused, are you okay? Yeah, you processing?

stay-calm-processing.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

her-processing-yeah.speaker: her

text.en: Yeah.

her-processing-yeah.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

false-time-constraint-friends.speaker: me

text.en: I'm actually meeting up with friends in like two minutes, but I just thought you were cute, so I was like, let's go see the cute girl. I was kind of intrigued to get to know you.

false-time-constraint-friends.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

her-phone-interrupt.speaker: her

text.en: Yeah, wait one second. Sorry, I was just talking to my friend.

her-phone-interrupt.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

engage-friend-facetime.speaker: me

text.en: Who's your friend? Who is she? Let me say hi. Listen, are you in the mall? We'll find you. We're headed over.

engage-friend-facetime.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

transition-walk-together.speaker: me

text.en: All right, I'm gonna head out in a minute. I'm not gonna hang out with your friends and stuff. How often are you in Brickell?

transition-walk-together.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

her-offers-number.speaker: her

text.en: Yeah, you could take my number, if that's what you were asking.

her-offers-number.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

dont-pounce-get-to-know.speaker: me

text.en: Well, I mean, I was just trying to get to know the cute woman first.

dont-pounce-get-to-know.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

her-age-question.speaker: her

text.en: How old are you?

her-age-question.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

flip-script-too-young.speaker: me

text.en: I'm 35. I think you're too young for me.

flip-script-too-young.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

her-qualifies-herself.speaker: her

text.en: I'm not 18, but I have daddy issues. So it's not a problem.

her-qualifies-herself.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

tease-fuckboy-phase.speaker: me

text.en: Would the family approve? Did I make a good impression or no?

tease-fuckboy-phase.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

her-sweet-but-fuckboy.speaker: her

text.en: Yeah, no, you're really sweet. But you do give off fuckboy-like vibes though. Are you out of that phase?

her-sweet-but-fuckboy.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

reframe-20-year-olds.speaker: me

text.en: I'm 35, damn. I ain't some little kid. I think you hang around a lot of 20-year-olds, I guess, right?

reframe-20-year-olds.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

her-subbing-me.speaker: her

text.en: Oh, you're subbing me.

her-subbing-me.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

her-direct-keep-walking.speaker: her

text.en: [Doesn't stop, keeps walking at normal pace]

her-direct-keep-walking.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA], Cold Approaching Girls [7o6FNxnsAnE]

persist-excuse-me-repeat.speaker: me

text.en: Hey, excuse me. Excuse me. Hi, one second, really quickly.

persist-excuse-me-repeat.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

her-slows-down.speaker: her

text.en: [Slows down and looks at you]

her-slows-down.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

walk-parallel-lower-intent.speaker: me

text.en: I was actually headed that way, but I just saw you. I thought you had a really interesting look. I wanted to come over really quick and say hi.

walk-parallel-lower-intent.source: From DISINTEREST to Getting Her Number [FNpZs1VhwaA]

her-direct-warm-thankyou.speaker: her

text.en: Oh, thank you! I thought you were cute too.

her-direct-warm-thankyou.source: Get a Date in 5 Minutes [e2dLEB-AwmA], What Happens When You Talk To Girls After Working Out [u2R8_rF_j2s]

opener-direct-cute-sporty.speaker: me

text.en: Hey, excuse me, hi. I just saw you walking by. I thought you looked super cute. I just wanted to come over and say what's up really quick. I know it's a little random.

opener-direct-cute-sporty.source: Get a Date in 5 Minutes [e2dLEB-AwmA], 6 examples of how to tease women [NioqePIJzN0]

her-sporty-whats-up.speaker: her

text.en: What's up?

her-sporty-whats-up.source: 6 examples of how to tease women [NioqePIJzN0]

followup-sporty-latina-vibe.speaker: me

text.en: You have this like fitness sporty latina vibe to you. Are you? What ethnicity are you?

followup-sporty-latina-vibe.source: 6 examples of how to tease women [NioqePIJzN0]

her-puerto-rican.speaker: her

text.en: Yeah, I'm Puerto Rican.

her-puerto-rican.source: 6 examples of how to tease women [NioqePIJzN0]

tease-strutting-preworkout.speaker: me

text.en: Hold on, are you late for something or what are you up to? I saw you strutting in here like on a mission, like the pre-workout was hitting.

tease-strutting-preworkout.source: 6 examples of how to tease women [NioqePIJzN0]

her-gym-mode.speaker: her

text.en: Kind of, kind of. I didn't have my chest day so I'm like, ah.

her-gym-mode.source: 6 examples of how to tease women [NioqePIJzN0]

text.en: Oh, thank you. We're gonna go see our friends.
I'm Kyle by the way. What are you guys up to right now? So what do I need to know about this girl? You guys are close friends, right?
She's goofy. She's funny. She works at a gym.
Oh, you work out around here or where? I'm brand new over here. I came in beginning of February.
Oh, shoot, like really? So you just living here? Just got here? So you're having the party life?
Not so much, honestly. Do I give off party vibes? I feel like if I brought you out to a party, you'd be quiet at first and then a couple shots you'd be fucking in.
So I went to Ultra...

I just thought you looked cute, honestly. You guys are going this way? I'm actually headed home, but I'll walk with you for like one block. Why don't we just exchange numbers? You down to hang out sometime?
Yeah, 100%. Here, give me your number.
Cool, let's do it. If the party's lame and you're bored, I'll be in the area. Maybe we can meet up. It doesn't need to be tonight, obviously.
Hey, excuse me, hi. I was actually just walking back that way and I saw you. I thought you looked really cute. That's why I wanted to come say hi really quick. That's all. How's your day going?
Good, I'm just shopping.
You got so much stuff on your one arm. You ever come down to Brickell or not really? I was in Brickell, I was looking. I was like, where is she? Donde esta?
Actually my daddy's here. He's on the first floor waiting for me.
I mean, I'm not ready to meet the father or anything like that. Maybe we could keep in touch if you come to Brickell. You have WhatsApp or what do you use?
WhatsApp.
Oh, I wasn't going for the handshake but... you're so warm and friendly.
Wow, you're so warm and friendly. Are you like that with all strangers? That's concerning. No, I just wanted to say I thought you looked cute. That's all.
I know, you're so warm and welcoming.

I feel obligated to get you a coffee or something. You like coffee or tea? Let's just stay in touch and if you're down we could do that. If not, maybe we could do something like tomorrow or a different day.
Can I just say that that looks really good? Is it an acai bowl or ice cream, or what'd you get?
Yeah, acai bowl.

transition-food-to-personal.speaker: me

text.en: Oh nice. I've been looking for a good spot around here. Are you from the area? You seem like you know the good spots.

transition-food-to-personal.source: 5 Phrases To Approach ANY woman [RHfsmA7QmmQ] - transition pattern (generalized from teaching)

her-from-area-yes.speaker: her

text.en: Yeah, I live nearby. There's a few good places.

her-from-area-yes.source: 5 Phrases To Approach ANY woman [RHfsmA7QmmQ] - transition pattern (generalized from teaching)

text.en: Yeah, thanks.

graceful-exit-walk-away.speaker: me

text.en: Nice. Enjoy it. Have a good day.

graceful-exit-walk-away.source: 5 Phrases To Approach ANY woman [RHfsmA7QmmQ] - Kyle teaches you can just walk away if she's not responsive

text.en: I really like your jersey, by the way. What is it exactly? I'm not familiar. I just like the color scheme.
Oh, it's just a fashion piece. It's my brand.

Oh, the way you're talking about it, you sound like you're the spokesman. Or it's like your brand. And you got the matching shorts too. I thought maybe it was a sports team but it's just a fashion piece. I saw you walking by and I was like, who's the cute girl with the jersey.
Thank you.

opener-question-location.speaker: me

text.en: Hey, do you know if there's like a Pura Vida or something over here? Are you familiar with the area or not really?

opener-question-location.source: 5 Phrases To Approach ANY woman [RHfsmA7QmmQ], 10 Conversation Starters [SPDOb_IE5YM]

text.en: If you go to Moffy's and then just go like down two blocks to the left.
Got it, okay cool. Are you from the area? You seem like you know your way around.
I'm from California.
I was gonna say, you have a vibe that you're definitely not from here. I wasn't sure if it was Cali. You're only like a tiny bit corrupted by Miami then. That's probably why I could tell.
Not at all. Just purebred, no, zero corruption.
No, I know that there is one in Brickell, but I'm not sure where.

opener-observation-behavior.speaker: me

text.en: You seem to be really vibing right now. I don't know what music you're listening to, but I was over there and I saw a cute girl walking, swagging to the music. I was like, what is she listening to?

opener-observation-behavior.source: 6 examples of how to tease women [NioqePIJzN0]

her-vibing-engaged.speaker: her

text.en: [Takes off headphones, smiles]

her-vibing-engaged.source: 6 examples of how to tease women [NioqePIJzN0]

followup-sitting-observation.speaker: me

text.en: Excuse me, can I just say really quickly, I thought you looked super cute, like, sitting in the all black. You look like you're dressed up, but you're comfy and casual at the same time.

followup-sitting-observation.source: 6 examples of how to tease women [NioqePIJzN0], 10 Conversation Starters [SPDOb_IE5YM]

her-observation-laugh.speaker: her

text.en: [Smiles, engages in conversation]

her-observation-laugh.source: 6 examples of how to tease women [NioqePIJzN0]

opener-casual-greeting.speaker: me

text.en: Hey, what's up? How's it going?

her-casual-good.speaker: her

her-casual-good.source: What Happens When You Talk To Girls After Working Out [u2R8_rF_j2s]

followup-observation-general.speaker: me

text.en: I didn't see the sweaty side of you. That's the good news. You were actually walking that way. I was like, oh, she's actually pretty cute. I just wanted to come over and say what's up. How was your run?

followup-observation-general.source: What Happens When You Talk To Girls After Working Out [u2R8_rF_j2s]

her-run-exhausting.speaker: her

text.en: Good. Exhausting, but that means that it did what it had to do, so.

her-run-exhausting.source: What Happens When You Talk To Girls After Working Out [u2R8_rF_j2s]

transition-local-or-tourist.speaker: me

text.en: Cool. Do you live here? You don't seem like a touristy vacation girl. You seem like you're actually one of the locals.

her-yeah-local.speaker: her

her-yeah-local.source: What Happens When You Talk To Girls After Working Out [u2R8_rF_j2s]

tease-rare-breed.speaker: me

text.en: You're a rare breed then. I had a couple people ask me, are you here for spring break? I could just tell after talking just for a little bit. Which is refreshing actually.

tease-rare-breed.source: What Happens When You Talk To Girls After Working Out [u2R8_rF_j2s]

clarify-mutual-attraction.speaker: me

text.en: Oh no. I thought you were cute. I thought you were cute.

her-mutual-cute.speaker: her

text.en: I thought you were cute! I guess we're cute.

her-mutual-cute.source: What Happens When You Talk To Girls After Working Out [u2R8_rF_j2s]

transition-name-introduction.speaker: me

text.en: Who are you? Who are you, by the way? What's your name? I'm Kyle, by the way.

tease-sweaty-see-again.speaker: me

text.en: It's okay. If I ever see you again, you need to be like fully dried off, dolled up. You probably look even cuter if you're actually wearing some... how do you dress?

tease-sweaty-see-again.source: What Happens When You Talk To Girls After Working Out [u2R8_rF_j2s]

her-this-is-peak.speaker: her

text.en: I think that this is my peak. This is the peak.

close-tempted-see-you.speaker: me

text.en: I'm tempted to see you in an environment where you're not dripping sweat. I think it would be cool, right? Let's do this then. What do you usually do? Are you free typically? When are you typically free?

her-free-now.speaker: her

text.en: Well, right now. Are we going to go?

text.en: I'm meeting up with some friends, but let's figure out when. Mondays I do have client calls and I like to hit the gym, but I'm free after like four or five. Maybe we could do something early evening. I'll hit you up over the weekend and maybe we can lock something in.

close-coordinate-monday.source: What Happens When You Talk To Girls After Working Out [u2R8_rF_j2s]

her-casual-flustered.speaker: her

text.en: Are you like flustered? I literally just finished working out.

her-casual-flustered.source: What Happens When You Talk To Girls After Working Out [u2R8_rF_j2s]

share-ethnicity-story.source: 3 Conversation Topics That Attract ALL Women [d8C0t7FS3qM]

tease-vanilla.speaker: me

text.en: Oh damn, okay so you're just vanilla. Got it. Wait, are you just vanilla all around, like personality? No, you're not personality, because I feel like you low-key have like a little bit of spice to you.

tease-vanilla.source: 3 Conversation Topics That Attract ALL Women [d8C0t7FS3qM]

text.en: What are you up to right now? Are you headed somewhere? I'll walk with you for like two minutes before I meet up with my friends.
Yeah, to go home.
Which way? You're going this way? I'll walk with you for like two minutes. What do you do for fun? Let's stop here because I'm not gonna follow you into the parking garage on some creeper shit.
I don't know, maybe we can do some of this sometime. Are you fully planned out for the night?

text.en: You're curling the 20s. I said, I see you curling the 20s. That's actually pretty impressive for a girl your size.
[Smiles, takes out headphones]
